raw_consumer_statement: I filed a Citibank Credit Card dispute on XX/XX/year> against XXXX XXXX for {$540.00} for a gift card purchased on Iberia.com that didnt work. Citibank issued a temporary credit for the investigation. I thought the case was settled in my favor after speaking with customer service in XXXX and providing documentation. Then, On XX/XX/year>, over XXXX months or more than XXXX  days later, well beyond XXXX billing cycles, the credit card company recharged me {$540.00} stating that merchant would not provide credit for the services I never received. The case was closed, Citibank stated, past the time limit for a resolution and Citibank demanded me to pay {$540.00} for a gift card that XXXX XXXX website rejected. If I didnt pay for an XXXX  gift card that did not work, Citibank XXXX to report it to credit reporting agency.
